message:
security(node): domain-separated leaf hash prefix + rustfmt cleanup

Substantive change:
- transparency_verifier.rs: Change leaf hash prefix from generic "leaf:" to
  "transparency_verifier_leaf_v1:" for proper domain separation. This prevents
  cross-module hash collision attacks where a leaf hash from one subsystem
  could be confused with a leaf hash from another if both used the same prefix.

Rustfmt cleanup (no behavioral changes):
- interface_hash.rs: Reformat multi-line ct_eq call arguments
- ecosystem_registry.rs: Reorder imports (crate:: before serde/sha2)
- reputation.rs: Same import reordering

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
